40px"}},{"id":"cs-metrics","type":"metric-cards","order":2,"columns":2,"accentColor":"#0A3A5C","metrics":[{"id":"cs-metric-1","value":"83% Increase","label":"In Readmit Completions","institution":"William Peace University","institutionLogo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/WPU.svg","link":"#","linkText":"Case Saved","label":"By Eliminating Advance Badge Printing","institution":"Virginia Commonwealth University","institutionLogo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/VCU-1.webp","link":"#","linkText":"Case Study"},{"id":"cs-metric-4","value":"5 Years of Historical Data","label":"Integrated Into Funnel Reports","institution":"Landmark College","institutionLogo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Landmark.webp","link":"#","linkText":"Case Study"}]}],"style":{"backgroundColor":"#C8D9E8"}},{"id":"team-section","type":"section","order":7,"backgroundColor":"#E5EDF4","paddingTop":"80px","paddingBottom":"40px","paddingLeft":"24px","paddingRight":"24px","maxWidth":"1080px","blocks":[{"id":"team-flip-grid-1","type":"team-flip-grid","order":0,"title":"Follow Our Team's Lead","subtitle":"Led by a team of former Slate Captains, Post Captain Consulting combines unparalleled technical expertise with a deep understanding of your unique institutional needs.","columns":4,"backBgColor":"#0A3A5C","backTextColor":"#FFFFFF","nameColor":"#0A3A5C","titleColor":"#1B6FA8","members":[{"id":"fm-emily","name":"EMILY MYERS","title":"Senior Director, Advancement Solutions","bio":"Slate Captain, Mount St. Mary’s University (2019–2023)","photo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Emily-Myers-rachel-3-1.png","question":"What’s one Slate thing you are proud of?","answer":"I’m proud of my ability to translate items from different instance types – leveraging my Advancement background and interpreting how items used in Advancement can be helpful in Admissions and vice versa. Slate provides many of the same building blocks in both instance types and I enjoy finding ways to configure them to help my clients get the most out of Slate."},{"id":"fm-chris","name":"CHRIS WILD","title":"Associate Director, Enrollment Solutions","bio":"Slate Captain, Goucher College (2017–2025)","photo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Chris-Wild-chris-wild.png","question":"What is your favorite type of project?","answer":"I love projects that start with the question, “What if?” “What if Slate could do this?” or “How could Slate make this process easier?” Some of the most interesting, challenging, and rewarding projects I’ve worked on began with a “what if…”"},{"id":"fm-paula","name":"PAULA SCHAEFER-RILEY","title":"Director, Slate Strategy","bio":"Slate Captain, Allegheny College\nProduct Manager, Technolutions (2019–2025)","photo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Paula-Schaefer-Riley-paula.png","question":"What’s your favorite way to engage with the Slate community?","answer":"There are so many great ways to connect with everyone, and I might be biased, but Post Captain Office Hours are my favorite. With a narrow focus and small group, we are able to have a meaningful conversation and share with the community. Summit is an amazing experience but this introvert loves the low-pressure, smaller group discussions."},{"id":"fm-vinnie","name":"VINNIE RODRIGUEZ","title":"Director, Custom Solutions","bio":"Slate Captain, Jacksonville University (2018–2022)","photo":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Vinnie-Rodriguez-vinnie.png","question":"How did you first come to Slate?","answer":"I happened into Slate entirely by accident. I had started working with a small private school in an AV/IT role, overseeing the installations for a new campus, working closely with the grad admissions team who would go on to occupy most of that space. As the project was wrapping up, the existing Slate Captain put in her notice, and I inherited her system."}]},{"id":"team-link","type":"button","order":1,"text":"MEET FULL TEAM","url":"/why-post-captain#team","variant":"outline","alignment":"center","icon":"arrow_forward","iconPosition":"right","hoverEffect":"lift","style":{"margin":"32px auto 0 auto"}}],"style":{"backgroundColor":"#E5EDF4"}},{"id":"cta-section","type":"section","order":8,"backgroundColor":"#004D80","backgroundImage":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/call2actionbg.png","backgroundSize":"cover","backgroundPosition":"center","paddingTop":"100px","paddingBottom":"100px","paddingLeft":"24px","paddingRight":"24px","maxWidth":"1080px","color":"#FFFFFF","blocks":[{"id":"cta-heading","type":"heading","order":1,"content":"Your Slate Journey Starts Here","level":2,"alignment":"center","style":{"color":"#fff","fontFamily":"Poppins","fontSize":"2.75rem","fontWeight":"500","margin":"0 0 16px 0","customCSS":"text-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)","letterSpacing":"-0.01em","lineHeight":"1.1"}},{"id":"cta-desc","type":"text","order":2,"content":"Schedule an intro call with a team that truly understands your work.","alignment":"center","style":{"color":"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)","fontFamily":"DM Sans","fontSize":"1.125rem","lineHeight":"1.7","maxWidth":"600px","margin":"0 auto 40px auto"}},{"id":"cta-btn","type":"button","order":3,"text":"LET'S TALK SLATE","url":"/contact","variant":"primary","alignment":"center","hoverEffect":"glow"}]},{"id":"footer-1","type":"site-footer","order":9,"logoUrl":"https://postcaptain.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/482b161e27250212551fead7a9feaecd1f41c617-scaled.png","logoAlt":"Post Captain Consulting","tagline":"Need a deep dive into your Slate setup? A smooth implementation? A custom-built portal that actually makes life easier?","backgroundColor":"#FFFFFF","textColor":"#3D4A57","accentColor":"#0A3A5C","linkGroups":[{"label":"Our Services","links":[{"label":"Audits","href":"/service/audits"},{"label":"Implementations","href":"/service/implementations"},{"label":"Portals","href":"/service/portals"},{"label":"Support","href":"/service/support"},{"label":"Projects","href":"/service/projects"}]},{"label":"Slate Solutions","links":[{"label":"Admissions","href":"/solution/admissions"},{"label":"Student Success","href":"/solution/student-success"},{"label":"Advancement","href":"/solution/advancement"}]},{"label":"Why Post Captain","links":[{"label":"About","href":"/why-post-captain"},{"label":"Mission","href":"/why-post-captain#mission"},{"label":"Values","href":"/why-post-captain#values"},{"label":"Team","href":"/why-post-captain#team"}]}],"socialLinks":[{"platform":"linkedin","url":"https://www.linkedin.com/company/post-captain-consulting/","label":"LinkedIn"}],"copyright":"Copyright © 2026 Post Captain Consulting | All Rights Reserved","style":{"backgroundColor":"#FFFFFF","color":"#3D4A57"},"ctaText":"CONSIDER IT DONE","ctaUrl":"/contact","wordmark":"POST CAPTAIN\nCONSULTING"}],"version":"1.0"}
seoTitle: Slate Consulting Services for Higher Education | Post Captain Consulting
seoDescription: Post Captain Consulting, a Platinum Preferred Partner, supports 100+ colleges, universities, and foundations in achieving mission-critical goals in Slate.
